description: Scrape Shopify App Store reviews into SQLite, browse via a serverless sql.js UI, and run a continuous opportunity radar: delta refresh -> claude -p auto-tagging -> snapshot diffs of unbundling scores.
language: Python 3.11+ (PEP 723 single-file scripts, run with uv) + vanilla JS/HTML UI

entry_points.purpose: Scrape review pages into reviews.db; polite (delay>=3s, backoff), incremental (COALESCE upsert), resumable

modes.full: walks every page, tracks scrape_progress, marks completed
modes.refresh: delta: newest-first, early-stops after K consecutive all-known pages; requires completed baseline per (app, ratings_key); never writes scrape_progress; prints +new/~updated summary
modes.check: live one-page canary: per-selector pass/fail table, exit 1 on failure, no db writes

entry_points.dom_rot_guards: plausible_listing_end(page, expected): 0-block page only accepted as listing end when (page-1)*10 >= 0.7*expected; blocks-but-none-parsed always aborts; star counts exact via link aria-labels

entry_points.purpose: Tagging plumbing + automation. Rubric (docs/tagging-rubric.md) is the single source of truth and IS the --auto prompt
entry_points.auto_mode: loop: fetch_untagged -> claude -p (rubric+contract+batch JSON) -> validate_tags -> import_rows; 1 retry with errors appended, then quarantine batch+response to exports/quarantine/ and skip those ids for the run
entry_points.discover_mode: reviews tagged only-'other' or only-low-confidence -> candidate new themes (NOT in THEMES) -> merge pass -> exports/theme-candidates.md; never touches db/THEMES

entry_points.purpose: Score (app, theme): 100 x weighted geomean(frequency, persistence, seniority, feature_shape); trend arrows; snapshot diffs
Export reviews.db to per-app markdown grouped by star rating

Serverless UI (Turkish labels): review browser + opportunity heatmap with trend arrows, drill-down with vendor_ack badges, churn flows. computeOpp/trendOf mirror the Python formulas — change both together

reviews.note: COALESCE upsert: a None parse never overwrites

apps.note: product = cross-source grouping from optional local products.json

scrape_progress.note: --refresh requires completed=1 and never writes here

docs.topic: Usage incl. radar loop, tests, responsible use
Tagging SSOT incl. vendor_ack; doubles as the --auto prompt

constraints: Privacy hooks (.githooks) block reviews.db, products.json, exports/, real target-app names, home paths, personal emails; exports/ holds quarantine + theme-candidates so they are auto-protected
Keep --delay >= 3s; backoff must survive in every new mode
Scoring AND trend exist twice (Python + JS in reviews.html); Python trend_of is normative — change both together
No external API in core: claude -p driver is optional plumbing; manual export/import flow unchanged
DB migrations must stay idempotent and backward-compatible (PRAGMA-checked ALTERs); sample.db must keep working in the UI
